task: Someone keeps asking me to confirm a time for later, but my plans might change depending on how the day goes. Can you help me write a short reply that keeps it simple and doesn’t lock me into anything too early?

turns.agent_response:
Sure — here are a few short options:

- **“I’m not sure yet. I’ll let you know later.”**
- **“Can’t confirm right now — I’ll update you when I know.”**
- **“Might be able to, but I need to see how the day goes first.”**
- **“Not locked in yet. I’ll text you later.”**

If you want, I can make it sound more **casual, polite, or firmer**.

user_simulator.text:
Yeah. Short enough.

Probably use: **“Not locked in yet. I’ll text you later.”**

Or a little firmer: **“Can’t confirm right now — I’ll let you know later.”**
